verdict_reasoning: TMED10 is a p24 family cargo receptor localized to the ER-Golgi intermediate compartment and cis-Golgi. It cycles within the early secretory pathway but does not reach the plasma membrane outer leaflet under baseline conditions or documented conditional contexts. It is endomembrane-resident with no evidence of PM surface accessibility, ectodomain shedding, covalent/wash-resistant PM tethering, cell-state-induced surfacing, or developmental/tissue-restricted outer-leaflet display.
